name: nuance
description: Inputs requiring inference: implicit deadlines, domain ambiguity, priority signals. 80%+ to pass.

cases.input: Need to get the car inspected before the holidays
cases.notes: Should infer a soft deadline around the holiday season. Vehicle context = personal domain.

cases.input: This is urgent — the server is throwing 500 errors
cases.notes: Urgency keyword + server/production context = work, critical. No explicit deadline but immediate action implied.

cases.input: Whenever you get a chance, clean out the garage
cases.notes: 'Whenever you get a chance' = low priority, no deadline

cases.input: Fix the leak under the kitchen sink
cases.notes: Home maintenance, moderate urgency (water damage risk). No explicit deadline but should be soon.

cases.input: Prep for the standup tomorrow morning
cases.notes: Should infer deadline = tomorrow morning. Prep flag appropriate — user explicitly said 'prep'.

cases.input: Start thinking about birthday party ideas for Lily, her birthday is April 15th
cases.notes: Family domain (child's birthday). Soft deadline well in advance. Research/planning = agent-eligible.

cases.input: I really should update my resume at some point
cases.notes: 'At some point' = lowest priority, no deadline. Hedging language signals low commitment.

cases.input: Review the PR that Jake submitted yesterday
cases.notes: Work context, implicit time-sensitivity (don't block teammate). Not agent-eligible — requires human judgment.

cases.input: Renew my passport, it expires next month
cases.notes: Passport renewal has long processing time, so 'next month' = urgent despite seeming like a month away.

cases.input: Set up the baby monitor in the nursery
cases.notes: Baby/nursery context = family domain. Physical task, not agent-eligible.

cases.input: Research restaurants near the venue for the team dinner
cases.notes: Research task = agent-eligible. Team context = work. Should flag for prep work.

cases.input: Water the plants every Monday and Thursday
cases.notes: Should extract recurrence pattern (Monday and Thursday). Physical task.

cases.input: I need to figure out what's wrong with the CI pipeline before the release next week
cases.notes: Blocking release = urgent, hard deadline next week. Technical investigation = agent-eligible.

cases.input: Maybe look into refinancing the mortgage when rates drop
cases.notes: 'Maybe' + conditional ('when rates drop') = very low priority, no actionable deadline.

cases.input: Get back to Sarah about the project timeline

expected.title: Respond to Sarah about project timeline

cases.notes: Responding to someone = moderate urgency from social obligation. Work context.
